title: calycobolus oddonii
intro: Calycobolus oddonii, also known as the 'Oddon's Calycobolus', is a plant species belonging to the family Convolvulaceae. Traditionally used in various parts of Africa for its medicinal properties, Calycobolus oddonii has been found to possess anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The plant has been associated with several health benefits, including its potential to aid in the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions. In herbal preparations, Calycobolus oddonii is often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, and it can also be dried and used as a powder or capsule for medicinal purposes.
